title: Contact - Samantha Dixon
meta_description: The official website of Samantha Dixon- Labour candidate for Chester North and Neston
text_excerpt: Contact - Samantha Dixon Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate Home About My plan News Latest Updates Newsletters In Parliament Latest Activity Visit Parliament Cost of Living Contact Office Standards River Dee Bathing Water Status More Menu Contact Need my help? Members of Parliament must follow strict protocols which only allow them to act on behalf of residents within their own constituency. You can find out if I am your MP by clicking the button below. Find your MP So that I can help you, I will need: Your full name Your full postal address including post code A contact telephone number and an email address if you have one Your national insurance number (where relevant) Copies of any supporting documents (where relevant) using the file attachment If you do not included relevant information, this will increase the time it takes for my office team to process your enquiry. Support form Need an appointment? If you would prefer to discuss your matter with me in person, over the phone, or via video link, then you can request an appointment slot by filling in my online form: Appointment booking form Further Contact Details To write to me, please use my address in the Houses of Parliament: Samantha Dixon MP, Houses of Parliament, London SW1A 0AA. My constituency office, located at The Bluecoat Building on Upper Northgate Street can be reached on 01244 343 229. My email address is samantha.dixon.mp@parliament.uk. Please find some further links below, which I hope are helpful for other support: Help with council issues Issues relating to services provided by Cheshire West and Chester Council can be raised with the relevant council department or your local councillor. You can find your local councillor and write to them by entering your postcode here . You can find out more about council services here. You can also report local issues directly to the Council through their online Report It Tool Further sources of advice If you urgently need support due to financial crisis or poverty, you can try contacting the HELP! Scheme . The Live Well website also has lots of information on local groups and support services that can help people with isolation, food and fuel poverty, health issues and other issues in Chester. You can find specific cost of living support and advice here . Follow on social media Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE10SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
